title: begonia reginula
intro: Begonia reginula, also known as the 'Royal Begonia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Begonia reginula can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
